description: refactor-max: CCEM APM v6.x architectural refactoring — DashboardLive decomposition, supervision tree restructure, async PortManager, ApiController domain split, static analysis tooling, @spec + @moduledoc coverage, and test suite expansion

userStories.title: Add Credo + Sobelow to dev deps and run clean baseline
userStories.description: Add Credo (code style linter) and Sobelow (security scanner) as dev dependencies in mix.exs. Run both tools, capture all findings to priv/docs/audit/credo-baseline.txt and sobelow-baseline.txt.
acceptanceCriteria: mix.exs dev deps include {:credo, ~> 1.7, only: :dev} and {:sobelow, ~> 0.13, only: [:dev, :test]}

userStories.title: PortManager: move System.cmd calls from handle_call to async Task
userStories.description: Move all System.cmd calls in PortManager to async Task + handle_info. handle_call must return within 100ms using cached ETS data.
acceptanceCriteria: No System.cmd calls inside any handle_call clause
scan_active_ports/0 triggers async Task, updates ETS, broadcasts via PubSub

userStories.title: ActionEngine: add run_map TTL pruning + list_runs/0 API
userStories.description: Add list_runs/0 public API and periodic pruning: runs older than 24h deleted, max 1000 entries enforced.
acceptanceCriteria: ActionEngine.list_runs/0 returns list of recent runs
Runs older than 24h pruned on hourly tick

userStories.title: Supervision tree: add ApmV5.AgUiSupervisor sub-supervisor
userStories.description: Extract EventBus, EventStream, EventRouter, HookBridge into ApmV5.AgUiSupervisor with :rest_for_one strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Root application.ex children count reduced by 4

userStories.title: Supervision tree: add ApmV5.IntakeSupervisor sub-supervisor
userStories.description: Extract ApiKeyStore, CommandRunner, InputRequestStore, AlertRulesEngine into ApmV5.IntakeSupervisor with :one_for_one strategy.
acceptanceCriteria: Root application.ex children count further reduced by 4

userStories.title: @moduledoc for 20 missing files — channels, controllers, LiveViews
userStories.description: Add @moduledoc to all 20 files identified in audit: 4 channels, 3 controllers, 10 LiveViews, 3 infrastructure files.

userStories.title: @spec coverage: all public GenServer client APIs
userStories.description: Add @spec to all public functions in 10 priority GenServers: AgentRegistry, ConfigLoader, ChatStore, PortManager, ActionEngine, BackgroundTasksStore, UpmStore, ProjectScanner, SkillsRegistryStore, FormationStore.
acceptanceCriteria: @spec on all public functions in the 10 specified modules

userStories.title: ExUnit tests: ActionEngine — all 4 catalog actions
userStories.description: Write ExUnit tests covering list_catalog/0, run/2, get_run/1, list_runs/0, async completion, ETS storage.
acceptanceCriteria: test/apm_v5/action_engine_test.exs with at least 15 test cases

userStories.title: ExUnit tests: ChatStore — scoping, persistence, AG-UI event capture
userStories.description: Expand chat_store_test.exs: send_message, list_messages, clear_scope, determine_scope (formation/project scoping), 500-msg FIFO, AG-UI TEXT_MESSAGE assembly.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 12 new test cases added to chat_store_test.exs

userStories.title: ExUnit tests: UpmStore — ETS tables, nil session guard, event tracking
userStories.description: Expand upm_store_test.exs: register/2, get_status/0 with and without sessions, record_event/2, list_events/1.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 12 new test cases in upm_store_test.exs
Regression test: get_status/0 with no sessions returns %{active: false, session: nil} without crash

userStories.title: ExUnit tests: AG-UI EventBus, EventStream, EventRouter
userStories.description: Write tests for AG-UI event pipeline: EventBus (subscribe, broadcast, wildcard), EventStream (subscribe, emit, clear), EventRouter (routing by event type).
acceptanceCriteria: test/apm_v5/ag_ui/ with at least 3 test files

userStories.title: ApiController: extract UPM, Formation, Showcase domain controllers
userStories.description: Split 65-action ApiController into domain controllers: UpmApiController, FormationApiController, ShowcaseApiController. All existing routes preserved.
acceptanceCriteria: Router updated, all existing routes still work

userStories.title: DashboardLive: extract AgentPanel sub-component
userStories.description: Extract agent card grid section from DashboardLive (1,914 lines) into ApmV5Web.Components.AgentPanel functional component.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard / still renders correctly in tests

userStories.title: DashboardLive: extract PortPanel sub-component
userStories.description: Extract port management section from DashboardLive into ApmV5Web.Components.PortPanel.

userStories.title: LiveView integration tests: DashboardLive, ShowcaseLive
userStories.description: Write LiveView integration tests for DashboardLive (8 tests) and ShowcaseLive (6 tests, including UpmStore nil session regression).
acceptanceCriteria: ShowcaseLive regression: mount without UpmStore sessions does not crash

userStories.title: OpenAPI v6.1.0: update spec with all new endpoints
userStories.description: Update OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec to version 6.1.0. Add missing DRTW, UAT, Activity, showcase endpoints.

userStories.title: CHANGELOG + version bump to v6.2.0
userStories.description: Write CHANGELOG v6.2.0 entry covering all refactor-max changes. Bump mix.exs to 6.2.0.
